mentions.note: Data management/analytics; largest RVI holding. Series K valued at $100B+, Series L at $134B. RVI already up on investment but later rounds risk overvaluation vs. eventual IPO.

Private, free cash flow positive, $5.4B revenue run rate, $134B valuation; doesn't need public markets because doesn't burn capital; solving enterprise AI's real problem (context/data, not intelligence); best-in-class execution and fundamentals-focused CEO—the company you really want.
